name: Temple & Webster Group Ltd
analysis: TPW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 80% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.9300, stop A$4.5738, target A$7.7400 (1.33:1) — then trail it.
